name: 腹黑雙胞胎反派
description: Cora表面是受害者（稱自己從小受苦），實則聯合母親Vanessa策劃一切陰謀：替嫁、抄襲作品、囚禁Ashley、冒充取代，是嫉妒與貪婪的化身。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: She took everything from me and you. I will take everything from her. / Now Josh is useless. Who knew blind Tristan would put up such a good fight? / I want her to disappear from Tristan's side completely.
examples.context: Cora表面是受害者（稱自己從小受苦），實則聯合母親Vanessa策劃一切陰謀：替嫁、抄襲作品、囚禁Ashley、冒充取代，是嫉妒與貪婪的化身。
